name: CONAGRA BRANDS INC.
summary: General Development of Business Conagra Brands,Inc. (the Company, Conagra Brands, we, us, or our), headquartered in Chicago, is one of North Americas leading branded food companies. We combine a 100-year history of making quality food with agility and a relentless focus on collaboration and innovation. The companys portfolio is continuously evolving to satisfy consumers ever-changing food preferences.
